name: Thoughtworks Holding, Inc.
description: Thoughtworks Holding, Inc. is a leading global technology consultancy that delivers extraordinary impact by blending design, engineering, and AI expertise. Founded in 1993 and headquartered in the United States, the company helps businesses navigate digital transformation by creating adaptable technology platforms, designing world-class digital products, and harnessing data and AI to unlock value. With a presence in 18 countries, Thoughtworks is recognized for its commitment to engineering excellence, software innovation, and a diverse, inclusive culture that empowers clients to thrive in an era of constant technological change.
